name: Sudan Bhati
bio: Sudan founded Saraswati Niwas with a vision to provide safe, comfortable, and top-tier accommodation for students migrating to Greater Noida.

name: Rishab Bhati
bio: Rishab leads our operations and student relations, ensuring our hostel spaces are continuously upgraded with modern facilities and robust security.

name: Sunita Devi
bio: Sunita oversees dining services, housekeeping, and warden management across all branches, guaranteeing home-style meal quality.

name: Vikram Singh
bio: Vikram directs our biometric gate access logs, CCTV patrols, and physical security teams to maintain a zero-incident student stay environment.
